description.en: Clears allkeyframeEffectscaused by this animation and aborts its playback.

description.en: Commits the current styling state of an animation to the element being animated, even after that animation has been removed. It will cause the current styling state to be written to the element being animated, in the form of properties inside astyleattribute.

description.en: Gets and sets the composite operation property for resolving the property value changes between this and other keyframe effects.

excerpt.es: Gets and sets the composite operation property for resolving the property value changes between this and other keyframe effects.

description.en: The current time value of the animation in milliseconds, whether running or paused. If the animation lacks atimeline, is inactive or hasn't been played yet, its value isnull.

description.en: Returns the time value in milliseconds for this timeline ornullif this timeline is inactive.

description.en: The current time of the animation that generated the event.
